translation_text: Or fame or life, Which do you hold more dear?
translation_text_raw: Or fame or life, Which do you hold more dear?

translation_text: Or life or wealth, To which would you adhere?
translation_text_raw: Or life or wealth, To which would you adhere?

translation_text: Keep life and lose those other things; Keep them and lose your life:
translation_text_raw: Keep life and lose those other things; Keep them and lose your life:

translation_text: - which brings Sorrow and pain more near? Thus we may see, Who cleaves to fame
translation_text_raw: - which brings Sorrow and pain more near? Thus we may see, Who cleaves to fame

translation_text: Rejects what is more great; Who loves large stores
translation_text_raw: Rejects what is more great; Who loves large stores

translation_text: Gives up the richer state. Who is content
translation_text_raw: Gives up the richer state. Who is content

translation_text: Needs fear no shame. Who knows to stop
translation_text_raw: Needs fear no shame. Who knows to stop

translation_text: Incurs no blame. From danger free Long live shall he.
translation_text_raw: Incurs no blame. From danger free Long live shall he.
